Surgical Treatment for Urine Leakage Cellulite Reduction and Body Contouring Contact Appointment Now Welcome to Manasi Clinic Happy Mother Healthy Baby online consultation Learn More 31 + Years of Experience Obstetrics & Gynecology focuses on complete women’s health, from adolescence to motherhood and beyond. Our specialists provide expert care in pregnancy, childbirth, and postpartum support, ensuring the safety of both mother and baby. We also offer advanced treatments for menstrual disorders, hormonal imbalances, infertility, and other gynecological concerns.

With modern diagnostic tools and minimally invasive procedures, we deliver safe, effective, and personalized care. From routine check-ups and preventive screenings to high-risk pregnancy management, our goal is to support women at every stage of life. We combine compassion, expertise, and modern technology to ensure the best outcomes for your health and well-being. About More Welcome To Manasi Clinic Obstetrics &  Gynecology IVF &  Infertility IVF &  Infertility Infertility is a growing concern for many couples today, but with the advancement of modern reproductive technology, parenthood is now possible with safe and effective treatments. In Vitro Fertilization (IVF) is one of the most trusted and successful methods to help couples conceive when natural methods don’t work.

Our expert team provides personalized infertility care, from accurate diagnosis to advanced treatment plans, ensuring compassionate support at every step of the journey. With modern technology, state-of-the-art labs, and highly experienced specialists, we focus on maximizing the chances of success while maintaining complete safety and comfort.

Whether it’s IVF, IUI, ICSI, or fertility preservation, we offer comprehensive solutions tailored to your unique needs. Our goal is to turn your dream of parenthood into reality with expert care and trust. More About Us Medical Aesthetics Medical Aesthetics Aesthetics treatments are designed to enhance natural beauty and restore youthful confidence with safe and advanced techniques. From skin rejuvenation and anti-aging solutions to chemical peels, laser treatments, and advanced facials, we offer a wide range of services tailored to individual needs.

Our expert team focuses on non-surgical, minimally invasive procedures that deliver visible results with minimal downtime. Whether it’s improving skin texture, reducing fine lines, treating pigmentation, or overall facial enhancement, our goal is to help you look and feel your best.

With modern technology and personalized care, we provide safe, effective, and long-lasting aesthetic solutions for radiant and healthy skin. Experience the perfect blend of science and beauty with our advanced aesthetic care. More About Us Our Doctors Meet Our Specialist Manasi Clinic

She guided us to attain proper weight for the baby in the next few weeks. She is extremely knowledgeable and very kind in her interactions." Sindhu Kinin Dr. Suman Singh ma'am is a thorough professional. Gives lot of importance to discipline and cleanliness. There's always a quick reply or a call too (when needed) over WhatsApp. Always available for timely action." Sumit Ranjan First time visited with my wife. Very nice doctor. Best part is she makes you comfortable first then discuss about your issue. We worried what questions doctor will ask and how much we'll be comfortable to answer it, but she is great in all terms." The supports and guidance provideds were invaluable, and we felts confidents in our decisions." About Dr. Suman Singh MBBS, MD(OBG), FAM, MCCG,FRM About Dr. Suman Singh MBBS, MD(OBG), FAM, MCCG, FRM Dr. Suman Singh is highly experienced with years of medical and surgical experience and routinely deals with several disorders related to the female reproductive system.


She also has successfully completed her Fellowship in Aesthetic Medicine and Masters in Cosmetic Gynecology, Medical Aesthetics is an advanced skin/hair clinic delivering the best of expert skin care, state-of-the-art equipment and effectiveness combined with safety and efficiency.
